description.default: HR moderation workspace for HB Kudos. Production permissions resolve solely from Entra ID security group membership in HB Kudos Admins and HB Kudos Reviewers — the webpart denies governance access when the current user is not a member. Cross-site list access targets a hardcoded canonical list host (HBCentral) — no editor configuration required. Includes a priority pulse strip, triage spotlight, unified triage list with row-level quick actions, bulk approve, governance actions, scheduling, prominence, claim/reassign, role-aware detail panel with audit timeline, and configurable overdue thresholds (pendingOverdueDays, adminReviewOverdueDays). Placement intent: premium moderation workspace authored to occupy a dedicated operator page and use full horizontal width — `supportsFullBleed` is enabled so operators can park the companion on its own SharePoint page (site-pages /SitePages/kudos-moderation.aspx or equivalent) and work the queue without competing with sibling webparts. Notification intents are session-queued; delivery channels (email/Teams) are not yet integrated.
